text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity being here. In the first space, the glass walls and empty chairs evoke a quiet before engagement—a pause filled with possibility. The sterile, ordered environment reminds me of the boundaries we create, both physically and socially, and I find myself wondering what conversations and connections might unfold here. Entering the second space, with its vibrant colors and bold text, I am drawn into reflection. The words on the screen resonate with my inner uncertainty and craving for understanding. I sense my own intentions drifting in the current of others' perceptions, suspended between visibility and concealment. There is both excitement and vulnerability in the invitation to explore and be seen.
